backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing user profile management, video upload, commenting, and subscription features with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Google Sign-In/Sign-Up, ProfileSetupModal pre-fill, Layout navbar Google auth display) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key changes, serving as a reference for build planning and feature tracking.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Mediatube app that loads the Google Identity Services script and mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, video, channel, upload, profile, search, shorts, reels, playlists, login, signup, etc.) wrapped in a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/AddToPlaylistBut: A button component that opens a popover allowing authenticated users to add or remove a video from their playlists, and create new playlists inline.
frontend/src/components/AdOverlay.tsx: Video ad overlay component that displays a banner ad with a countdown timer, auto-dismisses after 15 seconds, and shows a skip button after 5 seconds.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: A fixed mobile bottom navigation bar with five links (Home, Shorts, Subscriptions, Community, Profile) that highlights the active route and supports multiple languages.
frontend/src/components/CameraRecordingM: A full-featured camera recording modal supporting filters, zoom, music selection, mic selection, duration options, and camera flip, producing a recorded video blob on completion.
Displays a list of comments for a video with author avatars and timestamps, and provides an authenticated form to submit new comments.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostCar: Renders a single community post card showing author info, post content, optional image attachment, timestamp, and a delete option for the post owner.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostCom: A form component for authenticated users to compose and submit community posts with optional image attachments, including upload progress feedback.
frontend/src/components/EditProfileModal: A modal dialog component that allows users to edit their channel profile (name, handle, description), with validation and submission via the useUpdateUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/FilterSelector.t: A horizontally scrollable filter selector component that renders buttons for each available filter type, highlighting the currently selected one.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: A dropdown menu component that lets users switch the app language among seven supported options using the LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing navigation, search with voice support, user authentication controls, and multilingual labels for nav items across multiple languages.
frontend/src/components/MusicPickerPanel: A bottom sheet panel for selecting a background music track from a library, with preview playback support and an option to select no track.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for first-time channel setup, pre-filling name and avatar from Google auth data and saving the profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/RecommendedVideo: Displays a list of recommended video thumbnails and metadata beside the current video, with loading skeletons and filtering out the currently playing video.
frontend/src/components/ReelCard.tsx: A full-screen reel card component that handles video playback, mute toggling, like interactions, subscribe actions, and displays uploader profile info with a comments drawer.
frontend/src/components/ReelCommentsDraw: A bottom-sheet drawer component for displaying and submitting comments on a reel video, with per-comment author profile avatars fetched dynamically.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: A share button component that copies a video's URL to the clipboard using the modern Clipboard API with a legacy execCommand fallback, showing a tooltip and copied state.
A subscribe/unsubscribe button component that checks the current user's subscription status to a channel and toggles it, with loading and unauthenticated states.
frontend/src/components/TrendingVideos.t: A horizontally scrollable trending videos section that displays the top 10 non-short videos with rank badges, duration, view counts, and scroll navigation buttons.
frontend/src/components/VideoCard.tsx: A video card component that renders a thumbnail preview, duration badge, channel avatar, title, and metadata, with optional subscribe button and support for linking to reels or the video page.
frontend/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: A full-featured React video player component supporting play/pause, volume, seek, fullscreen, chapters, playback speed, end screen with countdown, and recommended videos navigation.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context provider that manages the user's preferred UI language, persisting the selection to localStorage and supporting seven language codes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddComment.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend addComment method for a given video and invalidates the comments query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddVideoToPlaylist: Mutation hook that adds a video to a playlist via the backend actor and invalidates related playlist queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminRemoveVideo.t: Mutation hook that removes a video via the admin backend method and invalidates the admin dashboard and all-videos queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCameraRecorder.ts: Custom hook that manages camera/microphone access, MediaRecorder-based video recording, audio device enumeration, facing mode switching, elapsed time tracking, and recorded blob/URL lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateApiKey.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new API key via the backend actor and invalidates the apiKeys query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateCommunityPos: Mutation hook that creates a community post with an optional attachment and invalidates the communityPosts query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreatePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new playlist with a title and description and invalidates the playlists query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteCommunityPos: Mutation hook that deletes a community post by ID and invalidates both communityPosts and communityPostsByChannel queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeletePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that deletes a playlist by ID and invalidates the playlists query on success.
Query hook that fetches the admin dashboard data, enabled only when the actor is ready and the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllVideos.ts: Query hook that fetches all videos from the backend actor and refetches on window focus.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetApiKeys.ts: Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's API keys, enabled only when the actor is ready and the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetChannelVideos.t: Query hook that fetches all videos belonging to a specific channel principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCommentCount.ts: Query hook that fetches the comment count for a given video ID, returning a number.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetComments.ts: Query hook that fetches all comments for a given video ID from the backend actor.
Query hook that fetches all community posts and returns them sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCommunityPostsB: Query hook that fetches community posts for a specific channel principal, sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetMonetizationSta: Query hook that fetches monetization statistics for the authenticated user from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistById.ts: Query hook that fetches a single playlist by its ID, returning null if not found or ID is absent.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistsByOwne: React Query hook that fetches all playlists owned by the currently authenticated user via the actor.
Query hook that fetches the list of videos belonging to a specific playlist ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetSubscribedReels: React Query hook that fetches short video reels from channels the authenticated user is subscribed to.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetSubscribers.ts: React Query hook that fetches the list of subscriber principals for a given channel principal.
React Query hook that fetches trending videos from the backend actor, with window focus refetch disabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetUserProfile.ts: React Query hook that fetches a user profile for a given principal, returning null if unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetVideo.ts: React Query hook that fetches metadata for a single video by its ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: Provides a GoogleAuthProvider context and hook for Google Sign-In using the GSI client, with JWT parsing and localStorage session persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useIncrementViewCount: Mutation hook that increments the view count for a video and invalidates related query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and hook for managing Internet Computer authentication via AuthClient, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: React Query hook that checks whether the currently authenticated caller has admin privileges.
frontend/src/hooks/useMusicMixer.ts: Hook that mixes a background music track with video audio using the Web Audio API's OfflineAudioContext, returning a WAV blob with progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemoveVideoFromPla: Mutation hook that removes a video from a playlist and invalidates playlist-related queries, showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useRevokeApiKey.ts: Mutation hook that revokes an API key via the actor and invalidates the API keys query cache, with toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Mutation hook that saves the caller's user profile and invalidates the current user profile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchVideos.ts: React Query hook that searches for videos by a search term, only querying when the term is non-empty.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetProfileImage.ts: Mutation hook that updates the caller's profile avatar by fetching the current profile and saving it with new image bytes.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscribeToChannel: Provides two mutation hooks for subscribing to and unsubscribing from a channel, both invalidating the subscribers query on success.
Mutation hook that updates the authenticated user's profile fields (name, description, handle, avatar) via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUploadVideo.ts: Mutation hook that uploads a video file with metadata to the backend actor, supporting upload progress callbacks and invalidating the videos query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoFilter.ts: React hook that creates a canvas-based filtered MediaStream from a video element, supporting CSS filters and zoom (1.0–3.0) via drawImage cropping at ~30fps using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts: React hook that wraps the Web Speech API to provide voice-to-text search functionality, exposing listening state, transcript, error messages, and start/stop controls.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines a multilingual translation map keyed by language code, covering UI strings for navigation, auth, search, community, comments, music/camera, and other app features (at least English and Spanish shown).
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet that defines dark-theme CSS custom properties (YouTube-style and Mediatube brand tokens) and utility classes for scrollbar hiding and brand gradient text/backgrounds.
frontend/src/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, loading the Google Identity Services script and mounting the React app via the #root div.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before rendering into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that displays platform stats, a list of users, and a video table with the ability to remove videos via a confirmation dialog, gated behind admin role and authentication checks.
frontend/src/pages/ApiKeysPage.tsx: Page for managing API keys, allowing authenticated users to create, view (masked/unmasked), copy, and revoke keys, with rows displaying label, status, and creation date.
frontend/src/pages/ChannelPage.tsx: Displays a channel's profile page including videos, playlists, community posts, and subscriber count, with tabs for navigation and a subscribe button. Fetches all channel data via React Query hooks using the channel's principal ID from the URL.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: Renders the community feed page with a post composer and a list of community post cards. Shows skeleton loaders while fetching and an empty state if no posts exist.
frontend/src/pages/CopyrightPolicyPage.t: Static informational page displaying Mediatube's copyright policy, including content ownership rules, DMCA takedown process, and contact details. Uses i18n for translations and breadcrumb navigation.
frontend/src/pages/DownloadAppPage.tsx: Marketing page for downloading the Mediatube mobile app, featuring a hero banner, app feature highlights, screenshots, and download buttons for Android and iOS.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main home page showing a horizontally scrollable category filter and a responsive grid of video cards. Displays skeleton loaders while fetching and an empty state when no videos are available.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page supporting Internet Identity, Google sign-in, and a placeholder email/password form. Handles post-login profile checks and shows a profile setup modal for new Google users.
frontend/src/pages/MonetizationPage.tsx: Displays a monetization dashboard for authenticated users, showing earnings stats cards with loading/error states and a refresh button; redirects unauthenticated users to a sign-in prompt.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistDetailPage.ts: Shows the details of a specific playlist including its videos as a list, allowing the playlist owner to remove individual videos or delete the entire playlist.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistsPage.tsx: Lists all playlists owned by the authenticated user in a grid and provides a dialog form to create new playlists; shows a sign-in prompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Renders the authenticated user's profile page with avatar upload, subscriber/video counts, and an edit profile modal; shows a sign-in prompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ReelsPage.tsx: Displays a TikTok-style vertical scrolling reels feed with 'For You' and 'Following' tabs, using an IntersectionObserver to track the active reel and handling unauthenticated states for the following tab.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResultsPage.tsx: Renders video search results in a responsive grid based on a URL query parameter, with loading skeletons and empty/no-query states.
frontend/src/pages/ShortsPage.tsx: Displays a grid of short videos (under 60 seconds) filtered from all videos, with loading skeletons and an empty state using a Zap icon.
frontend/src/pages/SignupPage.tsx: Signup page supporting email/password (stub), Google OAuth, and Internet Identity authentication, with a profile setup modal triggered for new Google users.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionsPage.tsx: Shows a grid of videos from channels the authenticated user subscribes to, fetched via the backend actor, with unauthenticated and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/UploadVideoPage.tsx: Video upload form supporting file selection, camera recording, optional background music mixing, and metadata input (title, description, short flag) before submitting to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/VideoPlayerPage.tsx: Video detail page rendering the player with chapter support, uploader profile, theatre mode toggle, comments, recommended videos, and action buttons (subscribe, share, playlist).
frontend/src/types/filters.ts: Defines the FilterType union, FilterConfig interface, and a FILTERS record mapping each filter name to its display name, CSS filter string, and icon.
frontend/src/types/music.ts: Defines the MusicTrack interface and exports a static MUSIC_LIBRARY array of five sample tracks with metadata and asset URLs.
frontend/src/utils/avatarHelpers.ts: Provides convertBlobToDataURL to convert a Uint8Array image to a base64 data URL with MIME detection, and getInitials to derive initials from a display name.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting view counts (K/M suffixes), relative timestamps from nanoseconds, and video durations into HH:MM:SS strings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (YouTube-style, Mediatube brand, Shadcn semantic), typography, shadows, border radii, and animations for the frontend.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for Mediatube tracking existing features (Google Sign-In/Sign-Up, ProfileSetupModal pre-fill, navbar Google auth display) and a pending new feature request for Gmail/Google ID sign-in and account joining.
